name: baseline_low_current
description: Nominal small harness with low current and valid sleeve fit.

signal_name,current,awg,color,wire_pn,length,note
SIGNAL_1,1.0,22 AWG,white,WIRE-22-WHT-001,12.0,Voltage drop review recommended

packaging.sleeve_length_note: Sleeve length includes 3% margin and 6 in tolerance, rounded up to nearest 0.5 ft

name: long_run_awg_bump
description: Long cable run should increase AWG and trigger voltage review.
voltage_flag: Voltage drop check strongly recommended for this cable length
wire_csv:
signal_name,current,awg,color,wire_pn,length,note
PWR_MAIN,12.0,14 AWG,black,WIRE-14-BLK-001,20.0,AWG increased for longer cable run; Long run: review voltage drop
PWR_RETURN,12.0,14 AWG,green,WIRE-14-GRN-001,20.0,AWG increased for longer cable run; Long run: review voltage drop

packaging.bundle_diameter_method: Bundle diameter estimated using RMS wire diameter and bundle factor
packaging.sleeve_length_note: Sleeve length includes 3% margin and 6 in tolerance, rounded up to nearest 0.5 ft

name: mixed_current_bundle
description: Mixed loads should produce multiple gauges and a normal sleeve fit.
wire_csv:
signal_name,current,awg,color,wire_pn,length,note
CTRL_A,3.0,22 AWG,blue,WIRE-22-BLU-001,15.0,Voltage drop review recommended
CTRL_B,8.0,18 AWG,yellow,WIRE-18-YEL-001,15.0,Voltage drop review recommended
MOTOR_PWR,25.0,12 AWG,red,WIRE-12-RED-001,15.0,Voltage drop review recommended; Current is close to ampacity limit
MOTOR_RTN,25.0,12 AWG,black,WIRE-12-BLK-001,15.0,Voltage drop review recommended; Current is close to ampacity limit

name: no_fit_sleeve_case
description: Large bundle should keep wire results and warn when no sleeve fits.
packaging_warning: No sleeve range found for bundle diameter 2.428 in. Wire design remains valid, but sleeve selection requires manual review.
